caption: The video captures a live event celebrating the foundation day of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), as indicated by the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" at the top. The scene is split into two frames: on the left, a prominent figure wearing an orange cap and a sash with the BJP logo speaks, likely addressing the audience. On the right, a large group of attendees, also dressed in orange caps and sashes, listens attentively. The setting appears to be a formal gathering or conference, with the audience seated in rows, suggesting an organized event. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of unity and celebration among the party members. The video is being broadcasted live, as indicated by the "लाइव देखें" text and social media handles at the bottom.
